headline: Robinhood Markets (HOOD): Unstoppable Stock to Buy in 2026
summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) is one of the Unstoppable Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 28, the company released financial results for Q1 2026, with total net revenues rising 15% YoY to $1.07 billion, amidst 7% YoY rise in transaction-based revenues and 24% YoY growth in net interest revenues. However, other revenues rose 57% YoY to $85 million. Net […]
